title: Panettone French Toast with Italian Chocolate Sauce
description: A decadent breakfast recipe featuring crispy panettone French toast smothered in a rich Italian chocolate sauce.
instructions: In a shallow dish, whisk together eggs, milk, and cinnamon.
Cut the panettone into 1-inch slices and dip each slice into the egg mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add 1 tablespoon of butter.
Cook the panettone slices for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the French toast to a serving plate and drizzle with maple syrup.
In a separate saucepan, melt the dark chocolate chips over low heat.
Add the heavy cream to the chocolate and stir until smooth.
Remove from heat and stir in butter and sea salt.
Drizzle the Italian chocolate sauce over the French toast and serve immediately.
